title: arundinella hispida subsp. humilior
intro: Arundinella hispida subsp. humilior is a plant species that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae) and is native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds that have been reported to have health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help to protect against infections and promote wound healing. Arundinella hispida subsp. humilior can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
